name: Szechuan Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 Green Onions, finely chopped (white part only)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a wok with oil until hot. Add the marinated shrimp and stir-fry until they are slightly pink, then dish out and drain well.
2. Leave 3 tablespoons of oil in the wok. Add ginger, green onions, and garlic, stirring until fragrant. Add the hot bean paste, ketchup, and return the shrimp to the wok. Stir again.
3. Add sugar, rice wine, and tapioca starch mixture. Cook until thickened.
4. Add chopped green onions and serve.
